obstacle_groups.label: Left anchor top — x=0, touches left and top edges
Left anchor bottom — x=0, touches left and bottom edges
Pole 1 top — x=3, touches top edge; gap at y=7..13 lets laser through
Pole 1 bottom — x=3, touches bottom edge
Pole 2 — x=6, gap at top (y=0..4); blocks y=5..19 including laser row
Pole 3 — x=9, gap at bottom (y=15..19); blocks y=0..14 including laser row
Pole 4 — x=12, gap at top (y=0..4); blocks y=5..19 including laser row
Right anchor top — x=14, touches right and top edges
Right anchor bottom — x=14, touches right and bottom edges
